$comment: Single source of truth for the Prototypes tracker page. Edit this file to update the page. Cards sort by lastUpdated descending (most recent first). Any link key in links{} that's empty/missing hides its button automatically.

prototypes.name: Programs — Privilege Activity
prototypes.description: Privilege Activity provider-based report — 4 metric cards (in-progress + active, coverage risk at 45 days, single-facility, idle) over AG Grid detail. Phase 1 grid stable; Phase 2 interactive cards depend on TanStack URL-filter lifecycle work.

prototypes.name: Digital Workers
prototypes.description: AI-powered Digital Worker platform — Editor reframe (draft + AI feedback), Applied Policies tab, PolicyOnboarding chrome. May 26: production integration reactivated at reduced cadence (3× daily vs every 2 hours). DW Hub deadline at end of current PI.

prototypes.name: Config Fees
prototypes.description: Fee Management UI — engineering-phase refinements + AR variant on deck. May 19 direction set: print docs show all individual fees with group references, billing grid per-fee-definition columns, client view hides fee details (client pushback reversal), agency view breaks out by GL accounting. AR scope pending Danny + Chris requirements session.

prototypes.name: Agency Scorecard Dashboard
prototypes.description: Real-time agency performance dashboard replacing manual quarterly PDFs. Rolling time-frame paradigm with MetricCards, donut charts, bar charts, and AG Grid detail tables.
